candidates.title: Sft Full Finetune and Task Accuracy

display.display_title: How Does Sft Full Finetune Relate to Task Accuracy at the Training Run Level?
display.research_question: At the US training run level, is sft full finetune associated with task accuracy outcomes after controlling for sociodemographic confounders?
display.rationale: Linking sft full finetune to task accuracy at the training run grain offers a policy-actionable lens: small-area variation in built-environment features is hypothesized to drive measurable differences in population health, and both inputs are publicly available.
display.contribution_angle: Combines HuggingFace_Models with Local_Eval_Harness at a finer grain than most prior work, using a paired run baseline vs treatment design with a comparative claim.
display.execution_summary: Sources: HuggingFace_Models + Local_Eval_Harness. Method: paired run baseline vs treatment. Grain: training run.

candidates.research_question: How does sft full finetune affect task accuracy at the training_run level?

mitigations.train_eval_leakage: Hold out eval split before training; verify no overlap by hash on prompt strings.
mitigations.eval_set_contamination: Prefer benchmarks released after base_model cutoff; record cutoff dates in evaluation_plan.
mitigations.seed_variance: Run treatment with ≥3 seeds; report mean ± std.
mitigations.gpu_oom: Pre-flight VRAM estimate; gradient_checkpointing on; smoke test before full run.
mitigations.license_violation: Whitelist apache-2.0, mit, cc-by-4.0, odc-by; hard-fail otherwise.
mitigations.irreproducible_run: Pin transformers / peft / bitsandbytes versions; log full config to wandb.
mitigations.tokenizer_mismatch: Always load tokenizer from same checkpoint as base_model.

candidates.brief_rationale: Assess whether sft full finetune is empirically associated with task accuracy using HuggingFace_Models and Local_Eval_Harness.
